proven.demos_exercises_quiz_exam_glossary_shard: sampled 0,1,6,12 of 13 — all green after glossary tip regex fix

how_to_run: npm run test:e2e-max:catalog && BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 npm run test:ux-campaign:smoke && for i in $(seq 0 12); do SECTION_SHARD=$i/13 npm run test:e2e-max:shard -- scripts/e2e_max/03_demos_exercises.shard.spec.ts scripts/e2e_max/04_quiz_options.shard.spec.ts scripts/e2e_max/05_exam_options.shard.spec.ts scripts/e2e_max/08_glossary_52.shard.spec.ts; done
residual_risks: Demo free-user exam attempt caps (3) cause later re-runs to return 400 — tests accept as product-valid
Pyodide Run not required for every demo (CDN/load flake) — surface presence asserted
Self-check QuizTab only when anonymous; ExamView when authenticated
Glossary SSOT vs V3 content remap — coverage advisory only
